title: Bash-Oneliner
summary:
A collection of handy Bash One-Liners and terminal tricks for data processing and Linux system maintenance. 
 I am glad that you are here! I was working on bioinformatics a few years ago and was amazed by those single-word bash commands which are much faster than my dull scripts, time saved through learning command-line shortcuts and scripting. Recent years I am working on cloud computing and I keep recording those useful commands here. Not all of them is oneliner, but i put effort on making the
